title: 1 Day Ujjain Temple Tour
shortDescription: A focused Mahakal and old-city temple plan for a short visit.
longDescription: Prioritize Mahakal darshan, one or two nearby temples and a comfortable meal break. Keep the schedule flexible for queues and traffic controls.

dayWisePlan.morning: Mahakal darshan with verified reporting guidance.
dayWisePlan.evening: Ram Ghat or Mahakal Lok, subject to crowd conditions.

whatsappShareText: My 1-day Ujjain plan: Mahakal darshan, Harsiddhi Mata, rest break and Ram Ghat/Mahakal Lok.

title: 2 Days Ujjain + Omkareshwar
shortDescription: A compact two-Jyotirlinga plan with Ujjain as the spiritual anchor.
longDescription: Use day one for Ujjain and reserve day two for an early Omkareshwar journey. Exact drive times must be checked for the travel date.

dayWisePlan.evening: Return with a generous road buffer.

travelTips: Consider an overnight if traveling with parents
whatsappShareText: My 2-day plan: Ujjain Mahakal on day 1 and Omkareshwar Jyotirlinga on day 2.

title: 5 Days Ujjain + Omkareshwar + Maheshwar + Mandu
shortDescription: A balanced Malwa circuit combining Jyotirlingas, Narmada ghats and heritage.
longDescription: This plan uses Ujjain and Indore as practical bases, with enough time to avoid turning every day into a long transfer.
foodSuggestions: Indore food walk on a light evening
travelTips: Verify road times and monument access
whatsappShareText: My 5-day Malwa plan: Ujjain, Omkareshwar, Maheshwar, Mandu and Indore with comfortable buffers.
